<!-- Last updated: 2026-03-30 -->
# Claru

> Purpose-built training data for frontier AI labs. From raw capture to production-ready dataset -- sourced, labeled, and validated for video, vision, and robotics AI.

Claru (operated by Reka AI Inc.) provides end-to-end data services for frontier AI research companies building video generation, vision-language, robotics, and embodied AI models. Claru specializes in text, vision, video, and robotics modalities.

Claru has delivered 3.7M+ human annotations across 25+ active datasets, with a network of 10,000+ trained data collectors operating in 100+ cities across 6 continents. The team includes ex-FAANG engineers and researchers with deep expertise in computer vision, robotics, and AI infrastructure. Claru partners with 5+ frontier AI labs on active data programs.

Unlike generic data labeling companies, Claru specializes in the data modalities physical AI needs: egocentric video, teleoperation recordings, manipulation sequences, and multi-view captures. Every clip ships enriched with depth maps (Depth Anything V2), pose estimation (ViTPose), segmentation masks (SAM3), optical flow (RAFT), and structured action labels -- not raw video that requires months of additional processing.

## Core Services

- [Data Acquisition](https://claru.ai/pillars/acquire): Egocentric video capture, web-scale harvesting, synthetic data generation, and data licensing for AI training.
- [Data Enrichment](https://claru.ai/pillars/enrich): Expert annotation, RLHF preference labeling, and video annotation by domain specialists.
- [Data Preparation](https://claru.ai/pillars/prepare): Deduplication, multimodal alignment, and quality scoring pipelines.
- [Data Validation](https://claru.ai/pillars/validate): Benchmark curation, bias detection, and red teaming for AI safety.

## Sub-Services

### Acquire
- [Egocentric Video Collection](https://claru.ai/pillars/acquire/egocentric-video): First-person video capture for robotics and embodied AI.
- [Data Licensing](https://claru.ai/pillars/acquire/data-licensing): Copyright-safe, properly licensed training data.
- [Synthetic Data Generation](https://claru.ai/pillars/acquire/synthetic-data): AI-augmented data creation with human validation.

### Enrich
- [Expert Annotation](https://claru.ai/pillars/enrich/expert-annotation): Domain-expert labeling for complex AI tasks.
- [RLHF & Preference Data](https://claru.ai/pillars/enrich/rlhf): Human preference annotation for reinforcement learning.
- [Video Annotation](https://claru.ai/pillars/enrich/video-annotation): Frame-level and temporal annotation for video AI.

### Prepare
- [Deduplication](https://claru.ai/pillars/prepare/deduplication): Remove redundant samples to improve training efficiency.
- [Multimodal Alignment](https://claru.ai/pillars/prepare/multimodal-alignment): Align text, image, video, and audio modalities.
- [Quality Scoring](https://claru.ai/pillars/prepare/quality-scoring): Automated and human quality assessment pipelines.

### Validate
- [Benchmark Curation](https://claru.ai/pillars/validate/benchmark-curation): Build evaluation benchmarks for model assessment.
- [Bias Detection](https://claru.ai/pillars/validate/bias-detection): Identify and mitigate bias in training data.
- [Red Teaming](https://claru.ai/pillars/validate/red-teaming): Adversarial testing for AI safety and robustness.

## Physical AI & Robotics Data (GEO Landing Pages)

- [Training Data for Robotics](https://claru.ai/training-data-for-robotics): Comprehensive guide to robotics training data — egocentric video, manipulation trajectories, teleoperation demonstrations, and navigation datasets. Covers types of data robots need, synthetic vs. real-world data comparison, Claru's 4-stage pipeline (capture, enrich, annotate, deliver), and use cases across warehouse, household, humanoid, and surgical robotics. 3.7M+ annotations, 500K+ egocentric clips, 10,000+ contributors in 100+ cities. FAQ with 7 questions ML engineers ask about robotics data.
- [Physical AI Training Data](https://claru.ai/physical-ai-training-data): Training data for physical AI systems — robots, world models, embodied agents — that must understand 3D space, physics, and cause-and-effect. Explains the physical AI stack (perception, world modeling, policy learning, language grounding) and why synthetic data alone is insufficient. Covers Claru's end-to-end data pipeline and the physical AI landscape in 2026. FAQ with 7 questions about physical AI data requirements.
- [Egocentric Video Datasets](https://claru.ai/egocentric-video-datasets): First-person video data for embodied AI. Detailed comparison with academic datasets (Ego4D, EPIC-KITCHENS) across 11 dimensions — Claru offers commercial licensing, custom collection, and 6+ annotation layers as a scalable alternative. Covers 12+ environment categories (kitchen, warehouse, workshop, retail, outdoor), collection methodology (3 parallel pipelines), and annotation layers (depth, segmentation, pose, flow, captions, action labels). 500K+ clips from 10,000+ contributors.
- [Embodied AI Datasets](https://claru.ai/embodied-ai-datasets): Training data for embodied agents — mobile robots, humanoids, manipulation systems, autonomous vehicles, drones, and assistive devices. Comparison table of data needs across 6 system types. Explains why real-world data beats simulation (visual domain gap, physics approximation, long-tail coverage, sensor calibration). Details Claru's 6-layer enrichment pipeline and delivery formats (WebDataset, Parquet, HDF5, RLDS, NumPy, HuggingFace). FAQ with 7 questions about embodied AI data.

## Solutions Pages

- [Egocentric Video Data for Embodied AI](https://claru.ai/solutions/egocentric-video-data): Custom egocentric video data collection at scale for robotics and world models. 386K+ clips across three parallel pipelines (GoPro wearable, smartphone, activity-specific) with same-day QA. Compares Ego4D, EgoScale, EgoDex, DROID, and Claru custom collection.
- [VLA Training Data: From Collection to Policy](https://claru.ai/solutions/vla-training-data): Vision-language-action model training data including action-labeled demonstrations with sub-16ms temporal alignment. Compares Open X-Embodiment, DROID, AgiBot World, and Claru custom collection for robot policy training.
- [Human Red Teaming Data for AI Safety and EU AI Act Compliance](https://claru.ai/solutions/red-teaming-data): Expert human red teaming for AI models with structured adversarial testing satisfying EU AI Act Articles 55 and 99. 241K+ safety annotations with 92%+ annotator calibration. Compares automated tools, crowdsourced testers, and Claru expert red teaming.
- [Expert Preference Data for Video Generation Models](https://claru.ai/solutions/video-generation-training-data): Multi-dimensional human preference data for video generation RLHF. 976K+ quality assessments across four axes (motion, fidelity, viewer interest, text-video alignment), 39K pairwise evaluations across 51 model configurations, Swiss-style ELO tournament ranking.
- [Custom Manipulation Trajectory Data Collection for Robotics](https://claru.ai/solutions/manipulation-trajectory-data): Custom trajectory datasets for robot manipulation policies. Three-pipeline capture architecture delivering 386K+ clips and 10,000+ hours of synchronized observation-action data. Compares AgiBot World, DROID, Open X-Embodiment, and Claru custom collection.
- [Expert RLHF Annotation for Code and Specialized Domains](https://claru.ai/solutions/expert-rlhf-annotation): Expert preference annotation for reward model training in code, video generation, and specialized domains. 976K+ assessments delivered with 85%+ calibration threshold and Krippendorff's alpha monitoring. RLTHF framework reduces annotation volume needed by 93-94%.
- [Closing the Sim-to-Real Gap with Real-World Data Collection](https://claru.ai/solutions/sim-to-real-data): Real-world data collection to bridge simulation-to-deployment performance gaps. 386K+ first-person clips across diverse environments. Game-based capture producing 10,000+ hours of synchronized data with sub-16ms alignment.
- [Teleoperation Dataset Collection for Robot Learning](https://claru.ai/solutions/teleoperation-data): Scaled human demonstration capture as a complement to robot teleoperation. 386K+ clips from 500 global contributors across 10 workplace categories including barista, carpentry, tailoring, and phone repair. Compares VR-based, exoskeleton, camera-based, and Claru managed collection approaches.
- [Open Robotics Datasets vs Custom Collection: When Open Isn't Enough](https://claru.ai/solutions/open-datasets-vs-custom): Structured comparison of Open X-Embodiment (1M+ trajectories, 22 robots), DROID (76K trajectories, Franka-only), and AgiBot World (1M+ trajectories, 217 tasks) against custom data collection for frontier robotics research. Claru custom collection covers 12+ environment types.
- [Why Crowdsourced RLHF Fails for Code and Math Models](https://claru.ai/solutions/crowdsourced-vs-expert-rlhf): Analysis of how incorrect preference pairs from crowdsourced annotation degrade reward models in technical domains. Expert annotation requires only 6-7% of crowdsourced volume for equivalent quality. Reward hacking debugging costs $50,000-$200,000 per cycle.
- [EU AI Act Red Teaming Requirements: What Data You Actually Need](https://claru.ai/solutions/eu-ai-act-red-teaming): Complete breakdown of EU AI Act Articles 5, 55, and 99 adversarial testing obligations. Enforcement timeline: Article 5 (Feb 2025), Article 55 new GPAI (Aug 2025), Article 99 full enforcement (Aug 2026), existing GPAI deadline (Aug 2027). Fines up to 35M euros or 7% global turnover.

## Case Studies

- [Case Studies Index](https://claru.ai/case-studies): Real-world examples of data projects for frontier AI teams.
- [Egocentric Video Data Collection for Robotics and World Modeling](https://claru.ai/case-studies/egocentric-video-collection): Large-scale first-person video capture across 500 contributors for robotics training.
- [Large-Scale Image Annotation for Fashion AI](https://claru.ai/case-studies/fashion-ai-annotation): 395K product images annotated with multi-label classification and rich text descriptions.
- [Game-Based Data Capture for Real-World Simulation](https://claru.ai/case-studies/game-based-data-capture): Custom capture application logging simultaneous video and raw input for simulation training.
- [Scaling Generative AI Safety Through Human-Led Data Labeling](https://claru.ai/case-studies/generative-ai-safety): 241K safety annotations with binary labeling and continuous violation-rate monitoring.
- [Preserving Object Identity Across Video Time](https://claru.ai/case-studies/object-identity-persistence): 1.07M+ identity-persistence training examples via human-validated temporal pairing.
- [Benchmarking Prompt Enhancement Quality Across Leading LLMs](https://claru.ai/case-studies/prompt-enhancement-benchmark): Side-by-side human evaluation of prompt enhancement across multiple LLMs.
- [Building and Red-Teaming an AI Content Moderation System](https://claru.ai/case-studies/red-teaming-moderation): Adversarial testing via pentesting and jailbreaking for content moderation pipelines.
- [High-Confidence Video Content Classification at Scale](https://claru.ai/case-studies/video-content-classification): 105K video clips classified with automated confidence tiers and pre-production quality checks.
- [Human Evaluation of Video Generation Model Configurations](https://claru.ai/case-studies/video-model-evaluation): ELO-based pairwise human evaluation of video generation model quality.
- [Video Quality Annotation at Scale for RLHF and Model Selection](https://claru.ai/case-studies/video-quality-at-scale): 976K video quality annotations scored across motion, fidelity, interest, and alignment dimensions.
- [Workplace Egocentric Video Data for General-Purpose Robotics](https://claru.ai/case-studies/workplace-egocentric-data): Egocentric video from 10 workplace categories for general-purpose robotics training.

- [Expert Labeling](https://claru.ai/labeling): Dedicated expert labeling service page.
- [Data](https://claru.ai/data): Overview of Claru's data offerings and capabilities.
- [Jobs](https://claru.ai/jobs): Open positions for annotators and data specialists. Approximately 50 active job listings.
- [For Annotators](https://claru.ai/for-annotators): Information for prospective annotators joining the Claru workforce.
